goal: Send personalized audit-led outreach emails to the 5 highest-scored outreach_drafted leads using CDP-authenticated Gmail (browser at 127.0.0.1:18800 is back online) with real-time audit API enrichment, producing provider_accepted ledger evidence.
success_criteria: 5 new provider_accepted email_attempt rows in ledger with Gmail message IDs from CDP send confirmation
CRM stages advanced from outreach_drafted to outreach_sent for 5 unique leads

slices.task: Query CRM directly via sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite 'SELECT id,name,contact_info,score,notes FROM leads WHERE stage="outreach_drafted" AND score >= 65 ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 5' to get the top 5 drafted leads with emails. For each: extract email from contact_info JSON, read prospect research from artifacts/prospects/*_website_audit_research_*.json, POST their website to https://outboundautonomy.com/api/audit to get live design/conversion/technical scores, craft personalized email body opening with their specific audit scores and site weaknesses, send via CDP Gmail at 127.0.0.1:18800 (compose, type, send flow), capture the Gmail message ID from the sent confirmation. Log each to ledger: sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite "INSERT INTO email_attempts (lead_id,recipient,provider,sender,status,provider_message_id) VALUES ('<id>','<email>','gmail_browser_cdp','owner@outboundautonomy.com','provider_accepted','<msg_id>')". Update stage: sqlite3 ... "UPDATE leads SET stage='outreach_sent' WHERE id='<lead_id>'". Write results table to artifacts/missions/cdp-smtp-batch-send-20260429-0436/bridge-results.md.

Verify the full audit-to-prospect funnel health: (1) curl outboundautonomy.com/ (/), /try, /sample-report, /pricing — confirm all 200, (2) POST https://outboundautonomy.com/api/audit with {"url":"https://example.com"} and confirm valid JSON with design/conversion/technical/competitor score fields, (3) POST again with {"url":"https://denverroofingco.com"} (real prospect) and capture all scores + response time, (4) curl /sitemap.xml and count blog posts (should be 11-12). Write full results to artifacts/missions/cdp-smtp-batch-send-20260429-0436/forge-funnel.md. File repair ticket if API returns non-200 or malformed JSON.

Read bridge-results.md and forge-funnel.md. Verify independently: (a) sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite 'SELECT id,lead_id,status,provider_message_id FROM email_attempts ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 15' — confirm at least 5 new provider_accepted rows with non-null message_ids, (b) curl each claimed URL from forge-funnel.md to confirm HTTP codes, (c) spot-check that at least 2 lead stages in CRM changed from outreach_drafted to outreach_sent. Write artifacts/missions/cdp-smtp-batch-send-20260429-0436/sentinel-verify.md with per-file verdict and evidence table. Append SCORE_EVENT to _shared/scoring/history.jsonl for outreach and engineering.

reasoning: CDP at 127.0.0.1:18800 confirmed back online by FORGE heartbeat — browser-authenticated Gmail sending is viable again. 13 drafted leads at avg score 70 are revenue inventory. 48 provider_accepted rows already exist — pipeline works. The ledger shows 1 more provider_accepted since last cycle (47→48), meaning sends are still flowing. This mission draws down drafted inventory with live audit scores as the email hook — the highest-converting cold outreach pattern. CDP sends are YELLOW (not SMTP) per BOOT.md evidence rules, but CDP is back and verified. Python CRM scripts have fd error so using sqlite3 directly for reads/writes.
